name: Long Beach Unified School District
about: Long Beach Unified School District serves approximately 62,000 students in Long Beach and adjacent communities in Los Angeles County, California.
calendarNotes: Long Beach Unified School District serves California's second-largest city in Los Angeles County and follows a calendar closely aligned with LAUSD, though exact start and end dates can differ by several days each year. Spring Break typically falls in early-to-mid April, consistent with the broader Los Angeles region. The district has a strong magnet and choice school system with separate application timelines. Families living near the LAUSD-LBUSD boundary — which runs through parts of South Los Angeles, Compton, and Carson — should verify their assigned district, as school calendars may differ even for households on the same street.
